feed.title: vvaves
feed.subtitle: My little spot of the internet for discussing programming, brewing beer, surfing and whatever projects I might currently be into.

entry.title: New Year, New Blog
entry.content: First post! It’s the start of a new year and I figured that I would create a new blog of all of my ramblings and projects. This is my first go with a static site generator, I’m overall impressed with using Jekyll, especailly in combination GitHub pages. Keeping it short and sweet for now, I should have something more substantial than a first post soon.
entry.summary: First post! It’s the start of a new year and I figured that I would create a new blog of all of my ramblings and projects. This is my first go with a static site generator, I’m overall impressed with using Jekyll, especailly in combination GitHub pages. Keeping it short and sweet for now, I should have something more substantial than a first post soon.
